channel.title: how to edit existing pages?
channel.description:
Hello! I'm new to frontity!! I would like to know how existing pages can be edited in frontity...for example, on my website I have Login as a child of Home, but I can't find the way to edit the Login page.
I thank you for your understanding and help.

item.title: how to edit existing pages?
item.dc:creator: wish63105
item.description:
That is amazing information nice
Regarded fifa mobile

Read full topic

item.title: how to edit existing pages?
item.dc:creator: shaguftashamid9
item.description:
Editing existing pages can vary depending on the context. If you’re referring to editing web pages, documents, or other digital content, here are some general steps you can follow:

1. Web Pages:

  • Content Management System (CMS): If the page is part of a website built on a content management system (such as WordPress, Joomla, or Drupal), log in to the admin panel, navigate to the page you want to edit, and use the built-in editor to make changes.
  • HTML/CSS Editing: If you’re comfortable with HTML and CSS, you can directly edit the source code of the page window and glass company washington dc using a text editor or an integrated development environment (IDE).

Read full topic

item.title: how to edit existing pages?
item.dc:creator: groupfuzion
item.description:
Hello! I’m new to frontity!!
I would like to know how existing pages can be edited in frontity…for example, on my website I have Login as a child of Home, but I can’t find the way to edit the Login page.

I thank you for your understanding and help.

Read full topic
